name: Screaming Burst Crystal
description: This weapon is decorated with engravings of bells, cymbals, drums, and other images associated with loud noises. A screaming burst weapon functions as a screaming weapon. In addition, the weapon explodes with sonic energy on a successful critical hit, dealing extra sonic damage. Critical ×2: 1d8. ×3: 2d8. ×4: 3d8. This is a continuous effect and requires no activation. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
